blog.title: Ostdeutsche Spediteure stehen unter Kostendruck — aber wodurch eigentlich?
blog.description: Ostdeutsche Spediteure erleben einen erheblichen Kostendruck unter anderem durch niedrigere Lohnkosten in osteuropäischen Nachbarländern. Interessanterweise, sind die Kostenunterschiede im Bereich von 10% und der eigentliche Kostendruck kommt aus einer anderen Richtung.

nftMetadata.prompt: "Moderne editorial-comic illustration of a long-distance truck on a German autobahn at sunset, cl...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #1780002735335
nftMetadata.description:
AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "Moderne editorial-comic illustration of a long-distance truck on a German autobahn at sunset, clean European logistics aesthetic.
Next to the truck float transparent cost blocks or infographic-style elements:
a small driver-cost icon, but very large fuel and toll-cost elements dominating the scene.
The illustration should subtly communicate that fuel and CO₂-related toll costs have become much more important than wage differences.
Style: intelligent modern business-magazine illustration, friendly but serious, warm colors, not political propaganda, no nationalism, no exaggerated stereotypes.
Slightly stylized European logistics setting, clean composition, visually intuitive and easy to understand."

prevBlog.title: My take on a housing podcast: Rent vs. Buy Is Not One Decision
prevBlog.description: The podcast argument against buying a home is strongest for young mobile professionals, but much weaker once you distinguish between different households and the very different risks they face.

nftMetadata.prompt: "A modern comic-style illustration of a person sitting at home listening to a podcast on headphon...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #1778004598170
nftMetadata.description:
AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "A modern comic-style illustration of a person sitting at home listening to a podcast on headphones, with a smartphone showing a podcast interface.
From the phone, abstract visual elements emerge: charts, houses, arrows — initially simple and clean — but gradually branching into more complex paths representing different life situations.
The listener looks thoughtful, realizing the idea is more nuanced than it first appeared.
Style: warm, friendly, slightly stylized editorial illustration, clean lines, soft gradients, contemporary European interior."
